CsrfToken.description: Token bound to the current opaque session.
CsrfToken.name: X-CSRF-Token

IfMatch.description: Numeric entity tag returned by the resource. Strong and weak HTTP forms are accepted.
IfMatch.name: If-Match

StrongIfMatch.description: Strong entity tag returned by the resource.
StrongIfMatch.name: If-Match

Conflict.description: The resource state conflicts with the request.

Forbidden.description: Permission, assignment or CSRF validation failed.

PreconditionRequired.description: A valid If-Match header is required.

Unauthorized.description: A valid opaque session cookie is required.

files.description: Strictly sorted by path; every extracted non-manifest file must be declared exactly once.

compatibility_status.description: Generic anonymous SteamCMD support remains best effort until an OS/architecture smoke test succeeds.

api_key.description: Printable ASCII without whitespace, quotes or backslashes.

body.description: Plain text; limited to 16384 encoded bytes, with LF and TAB as the only accepted control characters.

apply_command.description: Display-only authenticated Docker bootstrap and compose up command pinned by digest.

pull_command.description: Display-only authenticated Docker bootstrap and compose pull command pinned by digest.

source_path.description: Path inside a root declared by DMX_IMPORT_ROOTS.

upgrade_command.description: Locally constructed, display-only command pinning both signed checksums. The panel never executes it.

verification_uri.description: HTTPS accounts.hytale.com/device URL with an optional validated user_code query.

expression.description: Six- or seven-field cron expression; each field is limited to 64 characters.

content.description: UTF-8 text, limited to 524288 encoded bytes.
No NUL or control characters except LF, CR and TAB; the encoded body is also limited to 524288 bytes.

cookieAuth.description: Opaque HttpOnly SameSite=Strict session cookie. Secure is mandatory outside loopback development.
cookieAuth.name: dmx_session

info.description: Single-host game server management API. Secret values are write-only.
info.title: DmxServerManager API

200.description: Authenticated; session cookie and CSRF token issued.
Current user and rotated CSRF token.
Password changed, all sessions revoked and cookie expired.

parameters.description: One-time setup token; required when the effective client is not loopback.
parameters.name: X-Setup-Token

200.description: Whether initial Owner setup is required.
Latest installed revision of each local package.

post.description: Owner-only validated local .dmxpack import. The package never carries executable code, arbitrary CSS, shell commands or download URLs.

202.description: Package staged and persistent import job queued.

get.description: Returns only the validated closed design-token set and local checksum-pinned PNG assets for the exact active revision. No manifest, CSS, HTML or JavaScript is exposed.

200.description: Global active theme, or the built-in default.

put.description: Owner only. Selects one exact installed theme revision or restores the built-in default.

200.description: All active immutable revisions for the package.

delete.description: Owner-only deletion. A revision pinned by an instance cannot be deleted and its revision number can never be reused.

200.description: Unused package revision deleted and tombstoned.
Checksum-verified PNG asset declared by the package manifest.

ETag.description: Quoted SHA-256 of the immutable asset.

get.description: Authenticated SSE stream. Event IDs can be replayed while they remain in the bounded server history.

200.description: SSE events. JSON data events conform to EventEnvelope; stream.connected and stream.lagged are control events.

parameters.description: Managed relative file or directory path.
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Managed relative directory. Empty selects the instance root.
parameters.name: path

200.description: Latest revision of every visible profile.

201.description: First immutable Steam profile revision created.

200.description: Unused custom profile and all revisions deleted.
All immutable revisions for a profile.
Visible jobs, newest first, capped at 200.

post.description: Cancels a queued, running or waiting installation job when cancellation is still possible.

get.description: Owner only. Reports configuration booleans; provider credentials are never returned.

delete.description: Owner only. Removes the encrypted CurseForge API key.

put.description: Owner only. Encrypts the write-only API key with the panel master key.

200.description: CurseForge is configured; the key is not returned.
All current-user notifications marked as read.

get.description: Owner only. Returns only locally verified release metadata; the configured manifest URL and Ed25519 public key are never exposed. The panel never replaces itself.

200.description: Current signed-release check state and the platform-specific verified target, when available.

post.description: Owner only. Fetches the bounded manifest, verifies its Ed25519 signature and every required checksum, and returns instructions without executing them.

200.description: Signed-release check completed. Verification failures are represented by state and a non-sensitive error_code.
Roles visible to the current user administrator.
Custom role updated and affected sessions revoked.
Instances assigned to the current user.

201.description: Instance metadata created; installation is a separate job.

200.description: Stopped instance deleted; attached game data is detached.
Instance updated; install inputs may reset installation state.

202.description: Persistent installation or game-update job accepted.
Bounded command written to the managed process standard input.

parameters.description: Required for an Owner-supplied Bedrock archive requested by a waiting install job.
parameters.name: X-Dmx-Archive-Sha256

202.description: Persistent ZIP import job accepted, or waiting Bedrock install requeued.

200.description: Installed mods or plugins tracked by the manager.

201.description: Validated JAR installed while the instance is stopped.

post.description: Resolves a fixed Modrinth or CurseForge project/version, validates profile compatibility and dependencies, then downloads a checksummed JAR while the instance is stopped.

200.description: Instance pinned to a newer profile revision and marked for reinstall.
Allowed secret names and configured flags only.
Encrypted secret stored; value is never returned.

201.description: Local account created with mandatory password change.

200.description: Instance assignments for a manageable user.

get.description: Owner only. Secret Discord webhook URLs are never returned.

201.description: Webhook created; its URL remains write-only.

put.description: Owner only. Omitting url keeps the existing encrypted value.
